name: Blikmon

signature_move.name: Anti-Magic
signature_move.description: Cures self or ally Digimon from poison, paralysis, and confusion.

description: Guidebook ⇨ Japanese A robot-like Digimon. It grows steadily in all aspects except for speed. It has some offensive power, but it is better for developing it into a recovery medicine. Digimon World 2 -Brave Tamer Road- ⇨ English ロボットのようなデジモン。すばやさ以外は順調に成長する。攻撃力もあるが、むしろ回復薬に育てよう。 デジモンワールド2 -ブレイブテイマーズロード- ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K ⇨ English Template:K
